extract: Zeraora (Japanese: ゼラオラ Zeraora) is an Electric-type Mythical Pokémon introduced during Generation VII, in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Zeraora can Mega Evolve into Mega Zeraora using the Zeraorite. Mega Zeraora was introduced in the Mega Dimension DLC for Pokémon Legends: Z-A. Zeraora was officially revealed on April 9, 2018, on Oha Suta. It is the last Pokémon in the Alola Pokédex (Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon Version) and Hyperspace Pokédex.
